title: Factors That Make CF Industries Way Too Cheap
text: CF Industries is outperforming the market despite losing a quarter of its value since April of this year as traders have been selling agriculture-related investments. However, the agricultural bull market is far from over as tight supply is hitting high energy prices and ongoing issues in Ukraine.

title: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. Statement Regarding ITC Injury Determination Concerning Imports of UAN from Russia and Trinidad and Tobago
text: DEERFIELD, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, the U.S. International Trade Commission (“ITC”) made a negative final injury determination concerning its investigation of imports of urea ammonium nitrate solutions (“UAN”) from Russia and Trinidad and Tobago (“Trinidad”). “We are disappointed that the International Trade Commission has determined the U.S. UAN industry has not been harmed by the unfair trade practices from state-subsidized entities underpinning UAN imports from Russia and Trinidad that

title: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend and Confirms Dates for First Half and Second Quarter 2022 Results and Conference Call
text: DEERFIELD, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF) today reported that its board of directors has declared a $0.40 per share dividend on its common stock. The dividend will be payable on August 31, 2022, to stockholders of record as of August 15, 2022. Additionally, the Company announced that it will report its first half and second quarter 2022 results after the market close on Monday, August 1, 2022. title: Here's Why You Should Invest in CF Industries (CF) Stock Now
text: CF Industries (CF) gains on strong global demand for nitrogen fertilizers and an uptick in nitrogen prices on the back of tight supply.

title: CF Industries Vs. ICL Group: Who's King During A Boom In EV Demand And Commodity Prices?
text: CF Industries' EBITDA was $1,846 million in the first quarter of 2022, up 316% year-over-year. The dividend yield of ICL Group is 5.54%, which is significantly higher than for the sector.
